creation.name_restriction: Name cannot be in Thai and No special characters
creation.room_required: ⚠️ At least one room must be selected
creation.room_hint: Select one or more rooms to apply.
creation.pass_mode_desc: Block Mode: Default will block everything. Select services to let them passthrough.
creation.block_mode_desc: Pass Mode: Default will pass everything. Select specific services to block.
creation.services_hint_pass: Select services to apply under Block mode.
creation.services_hint_block: Select services to apply under Pass mode.
creation.queue_waiting: Waiting in Queue ({position} people ahead of you)...
creation.access_denied_msg: You do not have permission to access this page.
creation.login_required_msg: Please log in to configure firewall policies.

validation.name_required: Please enter a valid policy name.
validation.name_english_only: Policy name must contain only English letters, numbers, and spaces.
validation.name_too_long: Policy name must not exceed 17 characters.
validation.room_required:
Please select at least one room.

At least one source address must be specified.
validation.time_order: Start time must be before end time.

tour.policy_details_desc: Start by giving your policy a descriptive name (e.g., CNI2025). Choose the rooms (source addresses) where this policy will apply.
tour.services_desc: Select either Pass or Block mode. Pass mode blocks everything by default except what you select. Block mode passes everything except what you select.
tour.schedule_desc: Determine when this policy should be active. Select the specific Date, Start Time, and End Time for the policy.
tour.deploy_desc: Once all details are filled out, click here to deploy your configuration. It will be sent to the queue for processing.

creation.error: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.

dashboard.access_denied_msg: You do not have permission to view active policies.

details.room_required: ⚠️ At least one room must be selected
details.time_error: Start time must be before end time

queue.title: Policy Creation Queue
queue.empty: Queue is empty — no pending jobs.

users.no_users: No users found. Start by adding an allowed user.
users.delete_confirm: Remove this user's access? They won't be able to log in anymore.
users.add_description: Allow a new user from Active Directory to log in and manage policies.
users.role_admin_desc: Admins have full global system access.
users.role_ta_desc: TAs can manage policies for specific courses.
users.role_other_desc: Type a custom role name for this user.
users.role_lecturer_desc: Lecturers are restricted to default permissions.

cleanup.title: Upcoming Deletions Preview
cleanup.no_expired: No expired policies found. Everything is clean!
cleanup.delete_confirm_msg: You are about to permanently delete {count} expired policies. This action cannot be undone. Are you sure you want to proceed?

logs.search_placeholder: Search logs by policy, action, user, or details...
